title: Foundation
body:
# Foundation

Basic universal modpack for Minecraft.

Include a lot of QOL and optimization mods.

## "Element Stack"

Using `Sodium` `Sodium Extra` `Indium` to optimize your game performace. This modpack should work on any machine if you don't use shaders.

## Shaders and Resource Packs

Modpack come with Iris mod and some great Shader Packs. The shader is disabled by default, you need to enable it manully in Options->Video Settings->Shader Packs.

If you are a Redstone player, you definitely want to enable the `XeKr's Redstone Display` resource pack which gives you a lot of extra information like the status of a block, the power level of redstone dust and so on.

> Shader are enabled by default

## "MASA Stack"

Althought MASA mods like `Litematica` `MiniHUD` `Tweakeroo` and etc have not beed update to 1.20 yet. So the community compiled version of those mods have been added and provide you with the same functions as you expected. Also some extra mods based on "MASA Stack" have been added too.

Enabled tweaks by default:

- Map Preview
- Inventory Preview (`ALT` or `Option` key)
- Shulker Box Preview

Tips 1: Some of the functions of MASA Stack mods require `Carpet` mod to work on your server if you want to play in multiplayer.

Tips 2: Because of key conflict, some key bindings have been changed. You can go to Options->Controls->Key Bind to check it out. Note that the MASA Stack mods' key bind are not listed. The default key to open the world map has been changed to `G`.

## Key binds:

- `Y`: (Tweakeroo) Free Camera
- `B`: (Tweakeroo) Fake Sneaking
- `C`: (Tweakeroo) Fast Right Click
- `N`: (Litematica) Easy Placement Mode
- `H`: (MiniHUD) Light Level
- `G`: (Xaeros World Map) World Map
- `P`: (Xaeros Mini Map) New Waypoint
- `L`: (Do a Barrel Roll) Enable/Disable Do a Barrel Roll
- `J`: (Do a Barrel Roll) Enable/Disable Thrust

## About server-side

This modpack contains some mods that could work on a server. If you want to start a new Minecraft server and play with this modpack, considering add those mods too. Don't worry, vanilla Minecraft client could join the modded server.

Mods that are recommended to install on a server:

- Carpet
- Carpet Extra
- Carpet TIS Addition
- Plusls Carpet Addition
- Do a Barrel Roll
- Inventory Management
- Jade
- No Chat Report

Have fun!
